Description: Unique internal identifier for each fund
Business_Rules: Auto-generated sequential integer; immutable once assigned

Description: Official registered name of the fund
Business_Rules: Must match name on regulatory filings

Description: International Securities Identification Number
Business_Rules: Must be valid 12-character ISIN format; unique per fund

Description: Regulatory classification of the fund
Business_Rules: Must be one of: UCITS or AIFMD

Description: Country of fund domicile and registration
Business_Rules: ISO 3166 country name

Description: Base currency of the fund
Business_Rules: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code

Description: Date the fund was launched and available for investment
Business_Rules: Must be a valid past date in YYYY-MM-DD format

Description: Current operational status of the fund
Business_Rules: Must be one of: Active; Soft Closed; Hard Closed; Terminated

Description: Name of the appointed fund administrator
Business_Rules: Must match authorised administrator list

Description: Name of the UCITS ManCo or AIFM
Business_Rules: Must match CBI or CSSF register

Description: Unique identifier for each NAV record
Business_Rules: Auto-generated; unique per NAV calculation event

Description: Valuation date for the NAV calculation
Business_Rules: Must be a valid business day in YYYY-MM-DD format

Description: Net Asset Value per share or unit
Business_Rules: Must be positive; rounded to 6 decimal places

Description: Total Net Asset Value of the fund in base currency
Business_Rules: Must be positive; must equal NAV_Per_Share multiplied by Shares_Outstanding within rounding tolerance

Description: Total number of shares or units in issue
Business_Rules: Must be positive; reconciled against share register

Description: Indicates whether NAV is from administrator or internal calculation
Business_Rules: Must be one of: Administrator or Internal

Description: Current status of the NAV record
Business_Rules: Must be one of: Preliminary; Official; Restated

Description: Unique identifier for each share class
Business_Rules: Auto-generated sequential integer

Description: Name of the share class
Business_Rules: Must follow naming convention: Fund abbreviation plus class letter

Description: Currency denomination of the share class
Business_Rules: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code

Description: ISIN specific to the share class
Business_Rules: Must be valid 12-character ISIN; unique per share class

Description: Annual management fee in basis points
Business_Rules: Must be non-negative; maximum 300 bps

Description: Performance fee percentage if applicable
Business_Rules: Must be non-negative; zero if no performance fee applies

Description: Unique internal identifier for each investor account
Business_Rules: Auto-generated; unique per investor account

Description: Full legal name of the investor
Business_Rules: Must match AML/KYC verified name

Description: Classification of the investor
Business_Rules: Must be one of: Institutional; Professional; Retail; Eligible Counterparty

Description: Country of residence or registration of the investor
Business_Rules: ISO 3166 country name; required for CRS/FATCA reporting

Description: Tax residency jurisdiction of the investor
Business_Rules: ISO 3166 country name; required for CRS/FATCA reporting

Description: Tax Identification Number of the investor
Business_Rules: Format varies by jurisdiction; encrypted at rest

Description: Number of units or shares held by the investor
Business_Rules: Must be non-negative; zero for fully redeemed accounts

Description: Market value of investor holding in EUR
Business_Rules: Calculated as Holding_Units multiplied by NAV_Per_Share; converted to EUR if different currency

Description: Unique identifier for each fee calculation
Business_Rules: Auto-generated sequential integer

Description: Type of fee being calculated
Business_Rules: Must be one of: Management Fee; Performance Fee; Administration Fee; Custody Fee; Depositary Fee

Description: Start date of the fee calculation period
Business_Rules: Must be a valid date; period start must precede period end

Description: End date of the fee calculation period
Business_Rules: Must be a valid date; must be after Fee_Period_Start

Description: Calculated fee amount in EUR for the period
Business_Rules: Calculated per fee schedule rules; must be non-negative

Description: Approval status of the fee calculation
Business_Rules: Must be one of: Draft; Pending Approval; Approved; Paid; Disputed

Description: Unique identifier for each compliance check result
Business_Rules: Auto-generated sequential integer

Description: Code identifying the compliance rule being checked
Business_Rules: Must match a rule in the compliance rule library

Description: Date the compliance check was performed
Business_Rules: Must be a valid business day

Description: Outcome of the compliance check
Business_Rules: Must be one of: Pass; Fail; Warning; N/A

Description: Amount by which the limit was breached if applicable
Business_Rules: Zero if result is Pass; positive value if Fail or Warning

Description: Date by which the breach must be remediated
Business_Rules: Populated only for Fail results; calculated per regulatory rules
